name: Hermes
project_binding_recipe: Bind the Hermes project root and scope aliases before starting Hermes tooling.
approval_path: Let hasp mcp auto-open the daemon-backed session, then use project leases plus secret grants matching the intended Hermes workflow length.
safe_inject_path: Use hasp_run / hasp_inject through the generic stdio tool surface.
write_env_path: Use hasp write-env only with explicit convenience grants and warning surfaces.
